rationale: In the citing paper, Atefi et al. (2018) appears only as an illustrative example in a methodological footnote discussing bounded or discrete regressor distributions (e.g., percentage of trained salespeople). The citation is grouped with other references to motivate why flexible dependence modeling may be needed, not to build a specific argument from that study's theory, design, or findings. There is no direct use of Atefi et al.'s training framework, empirical results, or measures in the SORE method development or evaluation.
